ayugram-focus.exec: bash -c 'id=$(niri msg -j windows | jq -r ".[] | select(.app_id == \"com.ayugram.desktop\") | .id" | head -n1); [ -n "$id" ] && niri msg action focus-window --id "$id"'

firefox-focus.exec: bash -c 'id=$(niri msg -j windows | jq -r ".[] | select(.app_id == \"Firefox\") | .id" | head -n1); [ -n "$id" ] && niri msg action focus-window --id "$id"'
